title: Polling Preparations Intensify in Erode District
summary: Erode district administration has intensified election preparations across all constituencies, ensuring that polling booths are fully equipped with Electronic Voting Machines (EVMs), VVPAT units, drinking water, shaded waiting areas, and accessibility features for elderly and differently-abled voters. Officials conducted multiple inspections and coordination meetings with departments including police, transport, and health services. Special focus has been given to rural and interior regions to ensure accessibility and smooth logistics. Authorities emphasized transparency, voter convenience, and peaceful polling.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Surveillance
summary: Election flying squads and surveillance teams have stepped up monitoring across Erode district to prevent illegal cash distribution and electoral malpractices. Intensive vehicle checks were conducted on highways and key routes. Authorities reported seizures of unaccounted cash and materials, with investigations underway. Officials urged citizens to report suspicious activities to maintain fair elections.

title: Campaigning Ends with High Engagement
summary: Political parties concluded their election campaigns with rallies, public meetings, and door-to-door outreach across Erode. Candidates focused on local issues such as agriculture, textile industry growth, employment, and infrastructure. The final campaign day witnessed active participation from voters before the silence period came into effect.

title: Security Strengthened Across District
summary: Security arrangements have been tightened across Erode with deployment of additional police personnel and central forces. Sensitive areas are under strict surveillance with checkposts, patrol teams, and CCTV monitoring. Control rooms have been established to handle emergencies and ensure peaceful polling.

title: Transport Arrangements for Polling Staff
summary: Special buses and vehicles have been arranged to transport polling staff and election materials across Erode district, including remote villages. Authorities ensured proper scheduling to avoid delays.

title: Medical Facilities Strengthened for Poll Day
summary: Medical teams, ambulances, and first-aid centers have been deployed near polling stations to handle emergencies, especially heat-related issues. Authorities advised voters to take necessary precautions.

title: Heatwave Conditions Continue in Erode
summary: High temperatures continue to affect daily life in Erode district. Officials advised voters to avoid peak afternoon hours and use shaded facilities at polling booths.

title: Voter Awareness Drives Intensified
summary: Authorities conducted awareness campaigns through digital platforms, local outreach programs, and announcements to encourage voter participation.

title: Mock Polls Conducted Successfully
summary: Election officials carried out mock polling exercises across booths to ensure proper functioning of EVMs and VVPAT systems.

title: Illegal Cash and Liquor Seized
summary: Authorities seized unaccounted cash and illegal liquor during raids conducted to prevent election malpractices.

title: Night Patrols Intensified
summary: Police increased night patrols in sensitive areas to maintain law and order before polling.

title: Farmers Continue Agricultural Work
summary: Farmers continued irrigation and crop maintenance activities despite election preparations.

summary: Municipal teams cleaned roads and public areas near polling stations.
